hero.headline:

problem.title: Hotel operators face these challenges every day

cards.title: Misleading Comparisons
cards.desc: Room types, discount terms, and tax inclusions differ — surface-price comparisons lead to wrong conclusions

cards.title: Delayed Response
cards.desc: Checking OTAs and reviews separately slows down integrated decision-making

cards.title: No Clear Priorities
cards.desc: Data overload without knowing what to act on today

cards.title: OTA Price Intelligence
cards.desc: Collect competitor prices and interpret market positioning

cards.title: Review/VOC Intelligence
cards.desc: Structure guest reviews by sentiment, VOC, strengths and weaknesses

cards.title: Price × Review Diagnosis
cards.desc: Read pricing competitiveness and guest experience together

cards.title: Briefing & Action
cards.desc: Short daily briefing with today's action points

whyai.title: Why AI?
points: When reviews grow, humans can't read them consistently
When competitors multiply, manual analysis slows down
Operators need today's priorities, not lengthy reports
whyai.conclusion: AI isn't decoration — it creates speed and consistency in interpretation.

points.title: Price + Review Together

points.title: Decision Support

points.title: Overlay Adoption

overlay.title: How to Adopt
points: Install Chrome Extension and start immediately
Set competitors → collect → analyze in one click

forwho.title: Who It's For
items: Hotels that regularly monitor competitor pricing
